name: 01_bb_rsi_meanrev_xauusd_m15
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, when price closes outside a Bollinger Band with an extreme RSI(7) reading during active London/NY sessions AND BB-width is above its 30th percentile, price reverts to the mean within 30 bars more often than not, yielding PF>=2.0.

entry_rules.long: close[1] < lower_bb[1] AND close > lower_bb AND rsi(7) < 15 AND session_active AND bb_width_pct > 30
entry_rules.short: close[1] > upper_bb[1] AND close < upper_bb AND rsi(7) > 85 AND session_active AND bb_width_pct > 30
